name: EuiTour
description: Multi-step guided product tour anchored to specific elements.
visualDescription: An annotating popover panel anchored to a highlighted UI element. Similar in shape to EuiPopover but has an additional header with a step counter ("Step 1 of 5"), a subtitle, a title, body content, and a footer row with navigation buttons (End tour / Next). A beacon or highlight outline may appear around the anchor element. NOT a plain EuiPopover (EuiTour includes the step counter and navigation footer).
